narrative:
Beaver Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 730 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.1 percentage points.
